title: cyperus meistostylus
intro: Cyperus meistostylus, also known as the giant umbrella sedge, is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae. It is native to tropical Africa, where it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus meistostylus include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Traditionally, Cyperus meistostylus is prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used as a poultice or applied topically to affected areas.
